key.name: default-ssid
key.description: The default SSID (network name) used when creating a new hotspot.

key.name: default-password
key.description: The default WPA password for the hotspot. Must be at least 8 characters.

key.name: wifi-band
key.description: The WiFi band to use: 'bg' for 2.4 GHz, 'a' for 5 GHz, or 'auto' to let the system decide.

key.name: wifi-interface
key.description: The WiFi interface to use (e.g. wlan0). Leave empty for auto-detection.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often (in seconds) to refresh the hotspot status when the menu is open.

key.name: connection-name
key.description: The NetworkManager connection profile name used for the hotspot.
